nasb.text: A man’s discretion makes him slow to anger, And it is his glory to overlook a transgression.

esv.text: Good sense makes one slow to anger, and it is his glory to overlook an offense.

cnv.text: 人的明慧使他不輕易動怒； 寬恕別人過失的，是自己的榮耀。

ccb.text: 智者不轻易发怒， 饶恕是他的荣耀。

csbs.text: 人有见识就不轻易发怒； 宽恕过犯，是自己的荣耀。
